title: ジャパンCの後に・運命を越えて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Time to find out who will come out on top! Who
will be first at the end of this thrilling race?!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I've got goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Amazing. I had no idea it would be this thrilling to
watch you go all-out!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: No, it's not just you...

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
It's the two of you running together that makes
this so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're so strong, Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhh, I can't believe I lost, even though I ran
with everything I had! This is the grodiest feeling
ever!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...But it was fun.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
While I was running, I could feel my heart
pounding and excitement stirring in me... And I
didn't want to lose.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I wanted to run forever and ever... and beat you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Goodness me... What am I crying for? I
had so much fun, I should be beaming.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it's because you tried your hardest out
there.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The more earnestly you try at something, the
more it hurts to lose. That's what happens when
you race against a rival.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I learned that at the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Hehe. Listen to you, Chiyo. You've grown
and matured so much.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget today. I had such a marvelous
time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I did too. But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It'd be all right even if you did forget.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I don't want you to be content with just a memory
of a good race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen, we're rivals. We have to race against
each other more and more!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That way, even if you don't manage to remember
each individual race forever, you'll always have
the chance to experience new and greater thrills!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All right. I look forward to racing with you again,
darling rival of mine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Me too! I won't lose to you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yep! Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, were you watching me? Did you see the
moment I beat Maruzen?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ooh... Well, then...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Can I have a little reward?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Please praise me for doing a good job. You can
even pat my head!
choice_data_list: You did so well, Chiyono O!
You did so well, Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yay! Hehe... Hehehe!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Keep the praise coming! I was incredible
out there, you know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I ruffle Sakura Chiyono O's hair, she grins with
fulfillment and joy.
